problem id: dd900b68
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  00000101 -> 10101010
  11000100 -> 11011111
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00010000 -> 10111011
  10001100 -> 11101110
  11001011 -> 00100011
  00000010 -> 01110111
  01110101 -> 01110111
  01000101 -> 10111011

query: 11001100
predicted answer: 11111111
